data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding the time-limited accept/decline window.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to a time-limited accept/decline window, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this aspect. The existing evidence primarily focuses on customer bookings and waitlist entries without addressing the time-limited nature of the accept/decline process. Therefore, it is not possible to conclusively determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence confirming the behavior of the time-limited accept/decline window.
